demographics.living_situation: lives at home; an adult child is present and involved in her care

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is cramping so violently it takes my breath away, I can't keep any water down, and I haven't passed gas or stool in two days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramping got much worse over the day and she's been vomiting and can't keep anything down, so her adult child rang for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: Her bowels have been slowly changing over about the last four months; the severe cramping, vomiting and not passing anything came on and got much worse over the last day.
symptom_narrative.duration: Months of gradual change in her bowels; the severe pain, vomiting and blockage feeling over roughly the last 24 hours, with no gas or stool for two days.
symptom_narrative.character: Gripping, cramping tummy pain that comes in waves and takes her breath away.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The worst pain she's had — she can't lie still and keeps shifting around in bed.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: All over her belly, worse low down on the left side.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Comes in waves/spasms and has been getting steadily worse through the day.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing helps; she can't keep even water down.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It keeps building on its own and the vomiting makes it worse.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Bringing up large amounts of green-yellow fluid, a bloated swollen feeling in her belly, no wind or bowel motion for two days, gone right off her food, and a feeling that she still needs to go to the toilet but nothing comes.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: She's been getting more and more constipated over the last few months, which is not normal for her, and a few times noticed bright red blood in with her stool.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: She was independent but very tired lately; now she's stuck in bed, unable to move for the pain.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Bowels have changed over the last few months — becoming persistently constipated, which is new for her
Has lost a lot of weight without trying — the family thinks around 8 kilos over the last few months
Feeling very run down, tired and washed out recently

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Very distressed and frightened about why she has lost so much weight and become so unwell; adult child made the call and is with her.

objective_data_offered.value: her belly looks swollen and bloated
she's been vomiting large amounts of green-yellow fluid into a bucket by the bed
she looks pale and sweaty and keeps shifting around in bed because of the pain
she has not passed any wind or bowel motion for about two days
